goal: Create compelling narrative fiction for mature audiences across multiple formats
vision: Stories that entertain, challenge, and inspire adult readers across genres
problemSolved: Limited variety of quality narrative fiction; readers seek fresh voices and formats
usp: Multi-genre fiction (romance, thriller, psychological) with graphic and audio adaptations
mvp: Novel series in romance and thriller genres

validation.methodology: Reader engagement, review quality, genre-specific community growth
validation.successCriteria: 500+ reviews per novel, strong genre community engagement
